caption:
Geminis, your restless energy is about to collide with a major turning point in your life.

On April 10th, the stars align in a rare configuration that will push you to re-evaluate your relationships and priorities.
Get ready for a mental awakening that will leave you questioning everything you thought you knew about yourself and your place in the world.
As the sun shines brightly in your 3rd house of communication, your words will hold more power than ever before.
Use this opportunity to speak your truth and assert yourself in a way that will leave a lasting impact on those around you.

The truth is, Geminis, this is your chance to break free from the status quo and forge a new path that's truly yours.

Lucky number: 7
Lucky color: gold
Today's vibe: TRANSFORMATIVE

Get ready to shine, Geminis! What will you do with this transformative energy?

#horoscope #astrology #dailyhoroscope #gemini #zodiac #reels

script.hook: Geminis, your restless energy is about to collide with a major turning point in your life.
body: On April 10th, the stars align in a rare configuration that will push you to re-evaluate your relationships and priorities.
Get ready for a mental awakening that will leave you questioning everything you thought you knew about yourself and your place in the world.
As the sun shines brightly in your 3rd house of communication, your words will hold more power than ever before.
Use this opportunity to speak your truth and assert yourself in a way that will leave a lasting impact on those around you.
But be warned, Geminis, this transformation won't come without its challenges. Be prepared to face your fears and doubts head-on.
script.reveal: The truth is, Geminis, this is your chance to break free from the status quo and forge a new path that's truly yours.
script.cta: Get ready to shine, Geminis! What will you do with this transformative energy?
